title: Improving the viewing of a sharable link on a mobile device.
excerpt:

posts.author: LindsayWright (Lindsay Wright)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to share a board (view-only) with people outside our organization could be amazing. However, the benefit of this falls short because of the limitations of mobile viewing. Hardly any of the board can be seen because there is not the ability to scroll.

What are you trying to achieve

What would be extremely helpful is if the mobile viewing of boards was was more user friendly and allowed for scrolling so that the entire board, columns, etc can be seen. This is for people who are outside of our organization and do not have the MONDAY.com app. We just need them to have access to specific information on a specific board.

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lindsay,

we have an app called Board to Website Widget, which can be used to embed board data on a website. There are some examples on this page that you can check out on your mobile device.

Kind Regards,

Simon
